_comment: Mutation testing gate (Säule 2, the assert(true)-killer). Scope: the PURE balance projection only — see vitest.mutation.config.ts for why DB/HTTP/integration files are excluded. The fast-check property test from Task 8 is what kills the arithmetic mutants. 'break' is set just below the achieved baseline so it acts as a ratchet.
_thresholds_comment: Achieved baseline on projectBalance is 100% (3/3 mutants killed by the fast-check property test). break=100 makes this a strict ratchet: any surviving mutant fails CI.
